zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Clere於大約1475年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾時，她的父親Sir Robert de Clere23歲，母親Lady Alice Boleyn21歲。她於1494年與Sir Robert Peyton在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1517年在英國坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆享年43歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Clere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Clear
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from Clere, the French popular form of the personal name Clare 2, and possibly interchangeable with it or confused with it.

English (southeastern): probably a habitational name from clere, a component of several placenames in north Hampshire (Highclere, Burghclere, Kingsclere). This is probably from a Celtic stream name meaning ‘bright’ (cognate with Latin clarus ‘clear, bright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Klar   1.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Clere was born about 1475, in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert de Clere, was 23 and her mother, Lady Alice Boleyn, was 21. She married Sir Robert Peyton in 1494, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1517, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.Ormesby, Norfolk, England: Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Clere est née environ 1475, à Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Clere, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Boleyn, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Peyton en 1494, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1517, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Clere um 1475 in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Clere 23 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Boleyn 21. Sie hat 1494 in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Peyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1517 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Clereが約1475年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー スト ミチャエルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Clereは23歳，母Lady Alice Boleynは21歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムでSir Robert Peytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1517年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムで43歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Ormesby, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Clere(이)가 대략 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Clere(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Boleyn(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 Sir Robert Peyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Clere nasceu aproximadamente 1475, em Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert de Clere, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Boleyn, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Peyton em 1494, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1517, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Ormesby, Norfolk, England: ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Clere родилась около 1475 г. в местности ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Clere было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Boleyn, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Peyton в 1494 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1517 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Robert Peyton en 1494, en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas.
